name: twasol-pro-desktop
description: Twasol Pro - Radical Mobile LAN HTTPS
author: Twasol

scripts.desktop: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3020 && npm run electron"
scripts.mobile: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3020 && cd mobile-app && npm start"
scripts.all: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3020 && npm run electron" "wait-on http://localhost:3020 && cd mobile-app && npm start"
scripts.frontend:https: cd frontend && set HTTPS=true&& set SSL_CRT_FILE=..\certs\https\11.0.0.103\server.cert.pem&& set SSL_KEY_FILE=..\certs\https\11.0.0.103\server.key.pem&& npm start
